_note: skopeo/jq + a static provenance fixture. Digest pinning is deterministic: the run step reads the live digest from ghcr and envsubst-pins pod-by-digest.yaml. verify-labels depends on the sample image actually carrying OCI labels — if hello-dcs ships none, that check fails on env grounds (finding for the image, not the workshop). Live cosign verify is out of scope air-gapped; provenance is read from the fixture.

steps.run: export DIGEST=$(skopeo inspect --format '{{.Digest}}' docker://$DCS_REGISTRY/samples/hello-dcs:1.0) && echo "Pinning to $DIGEST" && envsubst < pod-by-digest.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc wait --for=condition=Ready pod/hello-pinned --timeout=120s
